title: Supreme Court extends disability law to acid attack survivors who suffer internal injuries without disfigurement
description: The Supreme Court on Monday ruled that the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 must include under its ambit acid attack survivors who suffer internal injuries, even there is no outer disfigurement.A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi asked the Central government to amend the Schedule under the Act to incorporate the change ordered by it to expand the definition.At present, the Schedule attached with the Act defines acid attack victims as person
